description: The main objective of this pipeline is to overlay greyscale or RGB images. The pipeline starts with the input images, overlays them using the ij1-color-blend-images node, and finally outputs the overlaid image.

bda68d24-2e6a-4d3e-bc69-7c326ef1cb41.name: ij3d-labels-to-roi
bda68d24-2e6a-4d3e-bc69-7c326ef1cb41.description: Converts a label image into 3D ROI

2653448f-a879-418a-a273-17a1c46e3fa1.name: ij1-color-blend-images
2653448f-a879-418a-a273-17a1c46e3fa1.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

aaf98bb0-93cc-445f-8e34-d28c8f463d95.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
aaf98bb0-93cc-445f-8e34-d28c8f463d95.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

5040ffe8-980a-4f67-8048-8e99597bf8b1.name: ij3d-roi-change-properties
5040ffe8-980a-4f67-8048-8e99597bf8b1.description: Sets the properties of all 3D ROI

1cac2d3e-49b7-4447-8cca-b698c66af91d.name: ij3d-filter-roi3d-by-statistics
1cac2d3e-49b7-4447-8cca-b698c66af91d.description:
Filters the 3D ROI list elements via statistics.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6df75662-428a-4ed0-872d-6215e3c3809a.name: ij1-feature-orientationj-2d
6df75662-428a-4ed0-872d-6215e3c3809a.description: Extracts various orientation-related features from the input image. These are the same features as produced by the OrientationJ Analysis.

496d7cb9-ef0c-429a-abdc-76d70da409ae.name: ij1-binary-connected-component-labeling-3d
496d7cb9-ef0c-429a-abdc-76d70da409ae.description: Applies a connected components labeling on a mask. Each connected component is assigned a unique value in the output label image. If the image is non-binary, the connected components are generated per-input value. If 3D data is supplied, the connected components are extracted in 3D.

d8a18002-09da-4bf6-813e-840d3a87b58a.name: ij1-color-blend-images
d8a18002-09da-4bf6-813e-840d3a87b58a.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

7d8b3f8e-a9d1-438e-9c4e-78b63c2f5a41.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
7d8b3f8e-a9d1-438e-9c4e-78b63c2f5a41.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

fc3fbaea-ed7c-486e-bb64-e663424853a2.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
fc3fbaea-ed7c-486e-bb64-e663424853a2.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

e4ecbaa2-cfc8-46df-b088-fb5e656f4de8.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
e4ecbaa2-cfc8-46df-b088-fb5e656f4de8.description:
Converts 3D ROI lists to a label image. Depending on the number of objects, an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image is generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

a32992da-ea0a-4b88-b9d7-788c85adf7a4.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
a32992da-ea0a-4b88-b9d7-788c85adf7a4.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

749c27b6-7ac0-4dd8-a7fa-f20fbe16a1c0.name: cellpose-inference-2.x
749c27b6-7ac0-4dd8-a7fa-f20fbe16a1c0.description:
Runs Cellpose on the input image with the given model(s). This node supports both segmentation in 3D and executing Cellpose for each 2D image plane. This node can generate a multitude of outputs, although only ROI is activated by default. Go to the 'Outputs' parameter section to enable the other outputs.
  • Labels: A grayscale image where each connected component is assigned a unique value.
  • Flows XY: An RGB image that indicates the x and y flow of each pixel
  • Flows Z: Flows in Z direction (black for non-3D images)
  • Flows d: Multi-channel image that contains the flows [dZ, dY, dX, cell probability] (3D images) / [dY, dX, cell probability] (2D images)
  • Probabilities: An image indicating the cell probabilities for each pixel
  • ROI: ROI of the segmented areas.
Please note that you need to setup a valid Python environment with Cellpose installed. You can find the setting in Project > Application settings > Extensions > Cellpose.

This algorithm merges all annotations and data annotations. Use the iteration step settings to determine how annotations and data annotations are merged
